stemHtml:
ATC request the pilot to do routine AIREPS every hour. He/she encounters turbulence, the passengers are restrained by their seatbelts.
His/her next AIREP is due shortly. What action must he/she take?

options.a: Make a special AIREP and include the moderate turbulence in your next AIREP.
options.b: As this is only moderate turbulence a report is not required.
options.c: Omit the routine report and submit a special AIREP.
options.d: Report the turbulence in your next AIREP.
